property.name: git.commit.message.full
property.value:
Merge pull request #1 from RozhinKh/feat-java21-benchmarking-6c189
feat: Implement Java 21 benchmarking and performance analysis suite

property.name: java.library.path

testcase.name: testBlockingDetectionHarnessMultipleVariants

failure.message: Expecting actual: ["java21-traditional", "java21-virtual", "java17"] to contain exactly (and in same order): ["java17", "java21-traditional", "java21-virtual"] but there were differences at these indexes: - element at index 0: expected "java17" but was "java21-traditional" - element at index 1: expected "java21-traditional" but was "java21-virtual" - element at index 2: expected "java21-virtual" but was "java17"

testcase.failure:
org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError:
Expecting actual: ["java21-traditional", "java21-virtual", "java17"] to contain exactly (and in same order): ["java17", "java21-traditional", "java21-virtual"] but there were differences at these indexes: - element at index 0: expected "java17" but was "java21-traditional" - element at index 1: expected "java21-traditional" but was "java21-virtual" - element at index 2: expected "java21-virtual" but was "java17"
at org.springframework.samples.petclinic.metrics.BlockingDetectionTests.testBlockingDetectionHarnessMultipleVariants(BlockingDetectionTests.java:162)
testcase.system-out: 15:15:16.849 [main] INFO org.springframework.samples.petclinic.metrics.BlockingDetectionHarness -- Initializing blocking detection harness... 15:15:16.856 [main] INFO org.springframework.samples.petclinic.metrics.StaticBlockingAnalyzer -- Starting static blocking analysis... 15:15:17.084 [main] INFO org.springframework.samples.petclinic.metrics.StaticBlockingAnalyzer -- Static analysis complete. Found 21 blocking patterns 15:15:17.086 [main] INFO org.springframework.samples.petclinic.metrics.BlockingDetectionHarness -- Static analysis complete: 21 15:15:17.086 [main] INFO org.springframework.samples.petclinic.metrics.BlockingDetectionHarness -- Starting blocking detection for variant: java17 15:15:17.086 [main] INFO org.springframework.samples.petclinic.metrics.JfrBlockingListener -- Started JFR blocking event listener 15:15:17.100 [main] INFO org.springframework.samples.petclinic.metrics.BlockingDetectionHarness -- Stopping blocking detection for variant: java17 15:15:17.100 [main] INFO org.springframework.samples.petclinic.metrics.JfrBlockingListener -- Stopped JFR blocking event listener.
